claimText: LICOMK++ is a high-resolution ocean simulation system developed by Chinese researchers.
evidenceExcerpt: LICOMK++ is a high-resolution ocean simulation system developed by Chinese researchers.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the origin and primary function of the LICOMK++ system.
distractorHooks: It is a space telescope or satellite
It is an oil spill containment chemical

claimText: LICOMK++ analyzes complex ocean processes like eddies and heat transport to improve predictions for extreme weather events.
evidenceExcerpt: It is hailed as an ocean 'microscope' to analyze complex processes like eddies and heat transport, improving predictions for extreme weather events.
examUse: Statement-based question on the applications of LICOMK++ in climate modelling and disaster prediction.
distractorHooks: Used exclusively for deep-sea mineral exploration
Incapable of predicting extreme weather events
Designed primarily to clean up marine plastic pollution
